title: garnotia micrantha var. micrantha
intro: Garnotia micrantha var. micrantha is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Garnotia micrantha var. micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
